title: Incorrect result with ORDER BY DESC and LIMIT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(x Int32, y String, z Float64, w String);
CREATE INDEX t2y ON t2(y) TYPE minmax;
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE x > 0 ORDER BY z DESC LIMIT 2;
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE x > 0 AND (y = 'apple' OR z = 2.71) ORDER BY z DESC LIMIT 1;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY DESC with LIMIT returning incorrect result
